docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGO, HUE THI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 425 HYDE STREET #35, SAN FRANCISCO $781.98 RENT, $118.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $899.98, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS OF $118.00 PER COST BILL.
